components.name: Accordion
components.description: High-fidelity accordion with smart indentation and expansion animations.

components.name: ActivityFeed
components.description: Comprehensive activity feed component suite for tracking updates and comments.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Multi-status notification banners (Success, Error, Warning, Info).

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact pill-shaped label for status, categorization, and counts. 4 styles x 10 colors x 2 sizes, basic/dot/icon/count layouts.

components.name: Banner
components.description: Full-width top-of-page announcement bar. 4 styles x 5 statuses, action link and dismiss.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Navigation trail of BreadcrumbItem links joined by a divider (arrow/slash/dot); last item is the current page.

components.name: Button
components.description: Standard interactive button mapping to primary and semantic intent tokens.

components.name: LinkButton
components.description: Button that renders as a semantic link with underline and icon support.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User profile images and status indicators.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Compact status indicator for table rows and lists. 2 styles x 5 statuses, optional dot mode.

components.name: SocialButton
components.description: OAuth-style login button for 7 brands (Apple/X/Google/Facebook/LinkedIn/GitHub/Dropbox), 2 styles, icon-only mode.

components.name: CompactButton
components.description: Small square icon-only button (e.g. dismiss/close). 4 styles x 2 sizes x 4 states, rounded-square or full-circle radius.

components.name: FancyButton
components.description: High-emphasis button with gradient-filled surface + ring shadow (neutral/primary/destructive), or plain bordered surface (basic). 3 sizes x 3 states.

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.description: Segmented control composed of ButtonGroupItem segments with collapsed shared borders. 3 sizes, one active (selected) segment.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Checkbox, CheckboxLabel, and CheckboxCard. Base control (2 sizes), a labeled composition with optional badge/description/link, and a selectable bordered card with a leading-visual slot.

components.name: ColorPicker
components.description: Fully functional color picker: ColorSpectrum (2D drag), ColorSliders (hue/opacity drag), ColorDots (10 preset swatches), and hex input. HSV<->hex math in colorUtils.ts.

components.name: ContentDivider
components.description: Section-separator with 9 variants (line, spaced line, labeled line, standalone label, solid label bar, and 4 button/button-group + line combos). Composes FancyButton and ButtonGroup.

components.name: CommandMenu
components.description: Command palette: CommandMenuSearchInput, CommandMenuItem rows, CommandMenuFooter. CommandMenu composes all three into a bordered card.

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Fully functional date/range pickers: DatePicker (single month + footer), DateRangePicker (two months + preset sidebar + range selection). Built on DayLabel, DayCell, DateSelector, PeriodRangeItem, and dateUtils.ts.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Switch (base toggle, 32x20 track, state prop for Default/Hover/Disabled), SwitchLabel (labeled composition), SwitchCard (selectable bordered card), and IntegrationSwitch (brand/integration row with title/badge/description, optional Manage button, Horizontal/Vertical x Card/List layouts).

components.name: Drawer
components.description: DrawerHeader (Basic/Left-Icon x Small/Large, title+description, dismiss, count badge, bottom divider) and DrawerFooter (Stretch/Basic/Checkbox/Toggle/Stepper/Link Button, each pairing Cancel+Continue actions). Includes StepperDots.

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: DropdownItem (generic leading slot, 4 states default/hover/selected/disabled, 2 sizes sm-36/lg-56, optional checkbox/badge/shortcut/toggle/button/rightIcon slots) and DropdownMiscItem (search input, 'Add Workspace' button row, caption footer row).

components.name: FileUpload
components.description: FileFormatIcon (colored file-type icon+tag, 9 colors x 2 sizes), FileUploadArea (drag-drop dashed zone with real drag/drop + file-input wiring), FileUploadCard (progress card with uploading/success/error states, dismiss/retry, reuses ProgressBar), and ImageUpload (Avatar/Company upload widget, Vertical/Horizontal alignment, Empty/Uploaded states).

components.name: Filter
components.description: FilterBar (horizontal toolbar, consumer-composed left slot + search/filter/settings/sort-by), VerticalFilterItem (sidebar filter row, default/hover/active/disabled), VerticalFilterHeader (panel header + Clear link), VerticalFilterFooter (Clear/Apply, reuses DrawerFooter's stretch layout).

components.name: SegmentedControl
components.description: Pill tab switcher — equal-width segments in a weak-bg track, active segment raised via white background + shadow. Supports label-only, icon+label, and icon-only segments, plus a per-item disabled state.

components.name: KeyIcon
components.description: Reusable circular icon container. 9 colors x 5 sizes x 2 styles (stroke = white bordered surface, lighter = tinted surface).

components.name: PaymentIcon
components.description: 8 fixed payment/bill-category icons (water/gas/electricity/donate/internet/phone/rent/tax), each with a pinned icon+color pairing.

components.name: ChartLegend
components.description: ChartLegend (colored dot + label) and ChartLegendDot (dot alone, 2 sizes). 11 colors matching Badge/ColorDots' state-token mapping plus a neutral lightGray, and a disabled state.

components.name: FormHelpers
components.description: Label (field label with required/sublabel/info/help), HintText (default/error/disabled helper text), and PasswordStrength (genuinely functional strength meter evaluating a real password string).

components.name: ContentItem
components.description: ContentLabel (unbordered list row, md/lg sizes, optional NEW badge and Switch toggle) and ContentCard (bordered card variant with a dismiss button). Both use a generic leading-visual slot.

components.name: Modal
components.description: Modal (functional open/onClose root with Escape/overlay-click-to-close and body-scroll lock), ModalOverlay, ModalHeader (6 types x 2 sizes), ModalFooter (7 types), and StatusModal (composed alert dialog).

components.name: NotificationFeed
components.description: NotificationHeader (title + Mark all as read), NotificationTabMenu (data-driven underline tab bar with count badges), NotificationItem (avatar row, Basic/File/Button/Message types, hover-reveal 'more' button), and NotificationFooter (keyboard-nav hint + Manage Notification link).

components.name: Pagination
components.description: PaginationCell (page-number button, 4 states x square/full radius) and Pagination (composed bar: Basic/Group/Full-Radius variants, real computed page-range logic with ellipsis collapsing, optional Page-X-of-Y and per-page select).

components.name: ProgressBar
components.description: ProgressBar (linear bar, real continuous 0-100% fill, 4 colors), ProgressBarLabel (title+percentage+bar+description with an optional Upgrade link, On Top/On Right layouts), and CircularProgressBar (SVG ring computed via stroke-dashoffset, 5 sizes, center label at size >= 56). Originally built inside FileUpload/, moved to its own folder and generalized when requested standalone.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Popover (floating card with icon/title/description/dismiss header, CSS-triangle tail, 12 placement variants) and PopoverFooter (Stretch/Stepper/Text Stepper action rows).

components.name: Radio
components.description: Radio (base control), RadioLabel (labeled composition with optional badge/sublabel/description/link), and RadioCard (selectable bordered card with a generic leading-visual slot). Mirrors the Checkbox/CheckboxLabel/CheckboxCard architecture.

components.name: Rating
components.description: RatingIcon (star/heart glyph, empty/half/full), Rating (aggregate read-only display), RatingCell (big selectable icon button), RatingBar (interactive 1-5 segmented selector: Emoji/Number/Star/Heart), and RatingBarArea (RatingBar + feedback textarea).

components.name: RichEditor
components.description: RichEditorToolbar (composable container), RichEditorItem (Text/Dropdown/Icon/Color button), RichEditorDivider, and RichEditorColorDot (10 colors). Figma's 4 rigid toolbar variants generalized into free composition of items.

components.name: Scroll
components.description: Scroll (parameterized track+thumb visual, 3 sizes x 2 styles) and ScrollArea (a real working custom scrollbar computed from actual scroll metrics).

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Floating hint card. 3 sizes (2X-Small/X-Small text-only, Large adds icon + title/description + dismiss), 8 placements, optional dark mode.

components.name: TimePicker
components.description: TimePickerItem (selectable time-slot list row, optional second time group + directional check-mark), TimePickerDuration (small duration pill), and TimePickerStatus (status pill with a colored dot — Available/Busy/In-meeting/Offline).

components.name: TextArea
components.description: Genuinely functional multi-line text field with a real live character counter, native vertical resize, and Default/Hover/Focus/Filled/Disabled/Error states. Composes the existing Label and HintText components.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Small removable label chip. 2 background styles (stroke/gray), a persistent active/selected state, an optional dismiss icon, and an optional sublabel. Figma's 6 leading-visual types collapsed into one generic `leading` slot.

components.name: Table
components.description: Genuinely functional data table — real column sorting (asc/desc/none) and real row/select-all checkbox selection, rendered as semantic table markup. TableCellContent provides the leading-visual + title/description cell layout; SortingIcon is the header sort-direction indicator.

components.name: TextInput
components.description: Input (core single-line field with generic leading/trailing slots, real password show/hide, real clear button, separated action button), TagInput (real tag list), CounterInput (real +/- stepper), PinInput (real multi-box OTP entry), InlineInput (borderless-until-editing field). Figma's 12 rigid Input 'types' collapsed into Input's generic slots.

components.name: SidebarComponents
components.description: Product Components > Navigation > Sidebar Components. SidebarItem (nav row with collapsed rail mode + active accent bar), HeaderCard + SidebarHeader (workspace switcher card), UserProfileCard + SidebarFooter (signed-in user card), and SidebarFeatureCard (6 promo/widget types x 4 styles).

components.name: SidebarNavigation
components.description: Product Components > Navigation. The full sidebar navigation shell — composes SidebarHeader + a real search input + a labeled main-nav item list + a supporting item list + an optional SidebarFeatureCard + SidebarFooter. Genuine controlled/uncontrolled active-item state, real search, and a `collapsed` prop switching every child to its icon-only rail mode.

components.name: TopbarComponents
components.description: Product Components > Navigation > Topbar Components. TopbarItem (horizontal nav tab with badge/notification count and an active state that recolors the icon to primary blue), TopbarUserProfile (compact avatar+name+verified chip with a flipping chevron), and TopbarIconButton (40px icon-only action button with an optional unread-notification dot).

components.name: TopbarNavigation
components.description: Product Components > Navigation. The full top navigation bar — brand logo (real Placeholder asset) + a horizontal main-nav item list with a real active-item state + an optional inline search field + quick-action/notification icon buttons + a real "Others" overflow dropdown + a TopbarUserProfile chip.

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Product Components > Page Headers. PageHeader (top-of-page header row — title + description, optional leading avatar/icon/brand via a generic slot, search + notification icon buttons, and secondary + primary action buttons) and SectionHeader (lighter in-page section header with tighter padding and search only, no notification bell). Both share one internal HeaderBar shell; the five Figma leading variants are supplied by composition rather than baked-in enums.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Product Components > Empty States. Playful grayscale empty-state illustration shown inside a widget or panel with no content yet — renders one of 34 self-contained SVG illustrations by set + type (18 HR Management, 16 Finance & Banking), with optional title/description/action slots for the common empty-state composition (hidden by default). Illustrations come from the local src/assets/Empty States/ asset set.

components.name: Widgets
components.description: Product Components > Widgets. Dashboard widgets on a shared WidgetCard shell, each with a populated and an empty variant (empties reuse the EmptyState illustrations). HR Management (14): Time Off, Current Project, Status Tracker, Notes, Schedule, Time Tracker, Employee Spotlight, Daily Feedback, Work Hour Analysis, Courses, Daily Work Hours, Training Analysis, Course Progress, Employee Rating. Finance & Banking (16): Stock Market Tracker, My Cards, My Cards (Vertical), Spending Summary, Exchange, Currency List, Recent Transactions, My Subscriptions, Quick Transfer, Donation Profile, Saved Actions, Total Balance, Total Expenses, Major Expenses, Credit Score, Budget Overview. Composed from existing primitives (SegmentedControl, ProgressBar, CircularProgressBar, Avatar, AvatarGroup, Badge, EmptyState) plus BrandLogo/CountryFlag/AccountCard helpers.

components.name: HRManagementDashboard
components.description: Sector Products > HR Management. A complete HR-management app screen assembled entirely from Product Components — SidebarNavigation + a PageHeader top bar + the 14 HR Management widgets in a responsive CSS-columns masonry. No new primitives; the top of the taxonomy above Product Components.

components.name: CalendarPageComponents
components.description: Sector Products > HR Management > Calendar Page Components. Building blocks for an HR calendar page: Calendar (weekly time-grid with positioned event cards + disabled column), CalendarCard (Meeting/Event block, 4 sizes, completed state), CalendarCell (card positioning within a time cell + empty/disabled), CalendarUpcoming (upcoming-event summary card), and UpcomingStatus (Later/Cancelled/Conflicted/Today pill). Ported from Figma 3878:61401, 3877:58564, 3877:58545, 3875:40906, 3873:40841.

components.name: NavigationOnboarding
components.description: Sector Products > HR Management. Onboarding flow top bar — brand logo + optional numbered step indicator (Personal → Role → Position → Password → Summary) + a 'Need help? Contact Us' cluster + close button. Ported from Figma node 3903:28827.
